summary: Completed testing of multiple UI fixes for OLL School CRM and Tracking Page. All 7 features tested and verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI fixes verified: 1) Edit Active Schools popup dropdowns show offerings with correct titles (26 options), 2) Payment Tranches section visible with Add Tranche button and status support, 3) Converted schools show ₹ without $ icon, 4) Tracking page shows Programs & Offerings section, 5) Footer shows 'Clonefutura Live Solutions Pvt. Ltd' and phone +91 99201 88188, 6) 'Relationship Manager' text used instead of 'Account Management', 7) Backend API returns onboarding_details with offering, book_type, training_type fields

edit_active_schools_dropdown.details: Offering dropdown shows 26 options with proper titles like 'Robotics Curriculum with Take-home Kits & Books', 'Robotics Curriculum with Lab Setup & Books', etc. Not empty.

payment_tranches_section.details: Payment Tranches section visible in Edit Active Schools modal with 'Add Tranche' button. Shows 'No payment tranches added' when empty. Includes status support (pending/paid/overdue).

converted_schools_currency.details: Converted schools tab shows ₹ symbol (e.g., ₹1,000) without DollarSign icon. Currency display is correct.

tracking_page_programs_offerings.details: School tracking page shows 'Programs & Offerings' section. Displays offering, model, kit_type, book_type, training_type from onboarding_details when available.

tracking_page_footer.details: Footer shows correct company name 'Clonefutura Live Solutions Pvt. Ltd' and phone number '+91 99201 88188'.

relationship_manager_text.details: Tracking page shows 'Relationship Manager' text instead of 'Account Management'. Verified in OLL Representative section.

backend_api_onboarding_details.details: Backend API /api/track/{token} returns onboarding_details object with offering, book_type, training_type, model, kit_type, total_students, total_amount, contract_start, contract_end, mou_url fields.

test_execution_details.test_type: Frontend UI Testing + Backend API Verification
